title: British  & Nigeria MoU On Rural Electrification
description: Minister of State for Power Mr Godwin Jedy-Agba,  Minister for Africa United Kingdom,  Mrs Vicky  Ford, British High Commissioner to Nigeria Mrs Catriona Laing, CEO InterCredit Mr Chinua Azubike and D
html: Minister of State for Power Mr Godwin Jedy-Agba,  Minister for Africa United Kingdom,  Mrs Vicky  Ford, British High Commissioner to Nigeria Mrs Catriona Laing, CEO InterCredit Mr Chinua Azubike and Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Lamido Yuguda  during the Signing of MOU on Rural Electrification between Nigeria and United Kingdom in Abuja today 21/2/22.
